title: Book Reviews
abstract: Books reviewed in this article: Ahmed, E., Harris, N., Braithwaite, J. and Braithwaite, V., Shame Management Through Reintegration Hammond, Phillip E., The Dynamics of Religious Organizations: The Extravasation of the Sacred and Other Essays Oswell, David, Television, Childhood and the Home: A History of the Making of the Child Television Audience in Britain Pierson, Christopher, Hard Choices: Social Democracy in the 21st Century van Leeuwen, Marco H. D., Maas, Ineke and Miles, Andrew, HISCO. Historical International Standard Classification of Occupations
